Hero.label: Portfolio — 2026
Hero.tagline: I design visual experiences that blend aesthetics, strategy and motion.

About.label: About me
About.heading: Design, motion and art direction.
About.bio1: Hi, I'm Barbs, a graphic designer with skills in motion graphics and experience in art direction. I'm driven by continuous learning and new experiences, which allowed me to grow within agencies, audiovisual production companies and communication and advertising firms.
About.bio2: At Conciergency & WeJazz I develop animated and static pieces for social media of high-reach brands like Kinder, Ferrero Rocher and Cosentino. I also take part in creative projects such as pitches, communication restylings, presentations and 360° campaigns.
About.bio3: In parallel, I collaborate with Arde Agencia Creativa (Mexico) on brand creation, branding, web design and digital strategies. This path led me to Fuego Creativo, where I serve as Art Director, providing support to agencies, production companies and businesses.
About.bio4: Every project is a challenge where I combine visual aesthetics with functionality to deliver creative and effective solutions, always aligned with the concepts and values of the brands.

Contact.label: Contact
Contact.heading: Let's work together?
Contact.body: If you'd like to collaborate on your next project or explore creative ideas together, feel free to reach out.

Metadata.title: Barbs Corbelleri — Graphic Designer & Art Director
Metadata.description: Graphic designer specialized in motion graphics and art direction. Creating visual pieces with aesthetics, strategy and movement.
